title: Publishing of UAPA Tribunal Notice and MHA Notification w.r.t. declaration of NSCN-K as ‘unlawful association’ under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967- reg.
MIZORAM STATE PROJECT MONITORING COMMITTEE CHUAN MIZORAM CHHIM LAMA HMASAWNNA HNA THAWH HRANG HRANG AN ENDIK
content:
4930/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 19:March ni 16–18, 2026 chhung khan Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee (MSPMC) Inspecting Team-te chuan Mizoram chhim lam leh chhimthlang lama hmasawnna hna thawh sector hrang hrang project 16 an endik a. MSPMC Inspecting Team hi team hnihah inṭhenin, Team-I hi MSPMC Member Er Sanghrima Chongthu chuan hovin, Pu B. Lalkhawngaihzuala (Member) leh Er Remlalmuanpuia (PA to Vice Chairman) te an tel a. Team-II hi MSPMC Secretary Er Lalthanzuala Ralte chuan hovin, Er H. Laldintluanga (Member), Er Joshua Thangliana (PME, PIME Unit, P&PI Department) leh Pu Lalthlamuana (LDC) te an tel.

MSPMC Inspecting Team-I-in project an endikte chu:

(1) Construction of 50 Bedded District Hospital, Hnahthial South-I Veng

(2) Construction of Solid Waste Management Centre, Lawngtlai–IV

(3) Upgradation & Maintenance of Diltlang to Chawngte 'P' Road (0.00–28.94 kmp) FC, CD, PW, Pavement

(4) Improvement of Chawngte to Borapansuri road (0.000–30kmp), Lawngtlai District CADC

(5) Construction of Galvanized Steel Concrete Composite Bridge over Boranpansuri River (NABARD Loan)

(6) Solid Waste Management Centre, Pukpui, Lunglei

MSPMC Inspecting Team-II-in an endikte chu:

(1) Upgradation & Maintenance of Bolia–Thenhlum road (0/00–16/230kmp) from Thenhlum Side

(2) Construction of Steel Trust Bridge over R. Tuisen @40/200kmp (PMGSY–III)

(3) Construction of Steel Trust Bridge over R. Zawlpui @31/700kmp (PMGSY–III)

(4) Construction of Steel Trust Bridge over R. Tuipawl @28/400kmp (PMGSY–III)

(5) Construction of Steel Trust Bridge over R. De @17/20kmp (PMGSY–III)

(6) Construction of Steel Trust Bridge over R. Sailungrek on P–T road @0/610kmp. (PMGSY–III)

(7) Upgradation and Maintenance of Phairuang–Thenhlum road (0/00–48/77kmp) from Bolia Side

(8) Construction of Solid Waste Segregation at Tlabung

(9) Construction of Higher Secondary School Building at Tlabung

(10) Follow-up Inspection of Construction of Concrete Gravity Impounding Dam at Tlawng River/Pialthleng

MSPMC Secretary Er Lalthanzuala Ralte chuan hna thawh ṭha lo lai zawng chhuak tur ni ringawt lovin, hna thawktute'n harsatna an neihte hmuhpui tur leh a chin fel dan kawng inkawhhmuh tura hna endik an nih thu a sawi a. Hna hrang hrang an endikte chu kawng siam ṭhat, lei dawh, bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna, sikul sak hna leh tui khuah hna te a nih angin mipui tan leh ram hmasawnna tura hna pawimawh tak tak a nih thu sawiin, hna hrang hrang chu a hun takah, a ṭha thei ang bera thawh zawh ni se an duh thu a sawi a. Team-I Leader Er Sanghrima Chongthu pawhin hna a nih dan tur tak leh a zawh hun tur dik taka thawh zawh chu an ngaih pawimawh leh hna thawktute pawh an chah ṭhin a nih thu a sawi.

Lunglei khawpui tui lakna Tlawng/Pialthleng luia tuikhuah siam mek hi a thuk zawng meter 13 niin, tui chim chin tur hi metre 12 a ni a; kilometre 1.360-a thui tling li tura ngaih niin, tui tam laiin tui litre maktaduai 240 khuah tlin theih tura ngaih a ni a. Tui khuah hna hi zawh thawkhat niin, Spillway leh Apron siam leh tur a ni a. Hei hi kumin March thla chhunga zo fel tura tih a ni.

Lunglei khawpui bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna tur, Solid Waste Management Centre, Pukpui daia sak mek hi Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban) 2.0 leh ringfenced fund aṭanga cheng nuai 385.6 senga thawh a ni a. Tunah hian 50% vel hna zawh tawh niin, August 2026 hi zawh hun tura bituk a ni.

MSPMC Team-te'n he'ng project an endik tam zawk hi Mizoram mipui mamawhna sang tawh tak kara beisei anga hna thawh chak si lote a ni hlawm a. Inspecting Team hi department ai awhte, hna thawktu contractor-te, khawtlang hruaitute, tlawmngai pawl ai awhte leh MJA te'n ṭawiawmin, harsatna hrang hrang leh chak zawka hna thawh a nih theih nana rawtnate an sawi ho va. MSPMC Inspecting Team chuan he'ng project hrang hrangte hi quality ṭha tak leh a hma thei ang bera mipui hman ṭangkai theih tura zawh a nih theih nan contractor-te chu ṭan la tura chahin, rawtna hrang hrang an neihte an hrilh a ni.

Attachment

title: LUNGLEIAH DISTRICT LEVEL WORKSHOP ON BANA KAIH (HANDHOLDING) SCHEME BUATSAIH A NI
content:
4929/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 19:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Monitoring Committee huaihawtin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hnuaia hma lakna thlir hona leh hma lak zel dan tur zir hona (District Level Workshop) buatsaih a ni.

He hun hi Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan kaihruaiin, kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Bana Kaih Phase-I chu Lunglei District-a department, bank leh mipuite'n an dawnsawn ṭhat thu leh progress partner mi 300 lai ziah luh an nih thu sawiin, a rem rem thawk leh lo neiha ei zawng mi eng emaw zatin he scheme avang hian ei zawnna ngelnghet leh ṭha zawk an neih phah tawh tih a sawi a. Ei zawnna bul ṭan tura bank kal tlanga sum puk kawngah a pung a san ṭhin avangin mipuiin an huphurh ṭhin tih sawiin, Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaiah erawh chuan a pung a tlem bakah sawrkarin a rulhsak dawn a, bank te pawhin ngai pawimawhin awlsam zawkin loan an pe chhuak ṭhin tih a tar lang a. Bana Kaih Phase-II kalpui mekah a tam thei ang berin loan dil turin District mipuite a chah.

DMC Chairman Pi Navneet Mann chuan Bana Kaih Scheme hlawhtlinna tur leh mipuiin an chhawr ṭangkai deuh deuh theih nan line department-te chu theih tawp chhuah turin a chah a. Phase-II-ah Lunglei District aṭangin progress partner tam zawk thlan chhuah ni se a duh thu sawiin, progress partner thlan chhuahte chu a changtu department-te'n ṭha taka vil zui a, hma lakpui zel turin a chah bawk.

He Workshop hi Mizoram State Policy Coordination Committee (MSPCC) aṭangin Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Pu Lalfakzuala, MSPCC Member Pu Lalchhuanawma Hrahsel leh official dangte'n hmanpuiin, implementing department hrang hrang leh bank ai awhte an tel a. Lunglei District Urban Development Officer Pi Lalhruaitlungi chuan report pein, department-te'n harsatna an tawh tlangpuite a tar lan bakah, loan pek chhuah chungchanga bank leh department inkara inbiak pawhna leh inhriat pawhna ṭha a awm a ṭul thu te, chu chu progress partner-te hma lakna vil zui kawnga thil pawimawh tak a nih thu te a sawi.

Handholding CEO Pu Lalfakzuala chuan Bana Kaih hnuaia loan pek chhuah theih hrang hrangte, Kisan Credit Card (KCC) leh loan dangte ṭangkaina leh ṭhatnate PowerPoint Presentation hmangin a sawi fiah a. MSPCC Member Pu Lalchhuanawma Hrahsel chuan Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia scheme hrang hrangte mipuite'n ṭangkai leh hlu zawka an hman theih nan inzirtir tam leh puanzar zau a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Bana Kaih loan dil dan leh Phase-I-a progress partner-te hlawhtlinna chanchin thlir ho niin, zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk a. Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pi Lalnunchhani Hnamte chuan lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme Phase-I hnuaiah Lunglei District chhungah department 10 kal tlangin progress partner 42 hnenah loan cheng nuai 234.4 pek chhuah tawh niin, Chief Minister's Special Package hnuaiah progress partner 368 hnenah cheng nuai 288.27 pek chhuah a ni bawk a. September ni 20, 2025 aṭangin Phase-II hnuaiah dilna hun hawn leh mek a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH INDIAN ARMED FORCES-A (ARMY, NAVY, AIR FORCE) "AGNIPATH SCHEME" AWARENESS CAMPAIGN NEIH A NI
content:
4928/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 19th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 khan ADC Chamber-ah Indian Armed Forces-a (Army, Navy, Air Force) "Agnipath Scheme" hnuaia Khawzawl District thalaite a tam thei ang ber an luh theihna turin Addl. DC Pu K. Zorammuana leh Army Recruiting Office hotu Aizawl atanga lo kalte nen hmalakna tur sawihona neih niin hemi hnu hian Govt. Khawzawl College-ah Awareness Campaign neih nghal a ni.

Agniveer scheme (Agnipath Scheme) hi June 2022-a launch niin, Armed Forces (Army, Navy leh Air Force) a sipai lakna dan thar a ni a, Agniveer-a lak luh te hi kum 4 chhung atan niin, kum 4 an thawh zawhah hian a thiam leh ti tha zual 25% te chu sipai hna pangngaiah lak luh (permanent cadre) leh an ni ang a, a bak 75% te chu an chhuak thung ang. Hlawh hi a kum khatnaah thla tin ₹30,000 atangin a intan ang a, a kum li naah chuan ₹40,000 an a pung ang. Kum 4 an thawh zawha an chhuah hunah, 'Seva Nidhi Package' tiin pawisa fai nuai 11.71 vel pek an ni ang. He pawisa hi tax awm lo tur a ni a, an thawh chhung hian cheng nuai 48 hu Life Insurance (non-contributory) pek an ni bawk ang. Agniveer-a thawk chhuak (permanent-a tling lo) te hian pension leh gratuity hamthatna an dawng lo thung a ni.

Kum 17.5 atanga 21 inkar an ni tur a ni a, General Duty (GD) tan Class 10 pass a ngai a, a dangah chuan Class 12 pass ngai a awm bawk.  Kum 4 an thawh zawhah hian 'Agniveer Skill Certificate' pek an ni ang a, class 10 pass-a lut te chu class 12 pass-a chiar theihna certificate pek an ni bawk ang. Mizoram-ah hian Army Recruitment Office (ARO), Aizawl-in recruitment rally leh exam-te a buaipui thin a, Inziahluhna (Registration) hiwww.joinindianarmy.nic.inah tih thin a ni a, tlawmngaia candidate-te puihna 'Helpline' pawh ARO Aizawl leh Assam Rifles-ah te siam thin a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM STATE PROJECT MONITORING COMMITTEE-IN EF&CC DEPT. CENTRAL NURSERY, SAIRANG AN ENDIK
content:
4927/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 19th March, 2026:Nimin, March ni 18, 2026 khan Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee (MSPMC) Inspecting Team chuan Pu R. Lal Rinawma, Vice Chairman, MSPMC hovinSairang Dinthar-aCAMPA fund hmanga hnathawh hrang hrangte an endik.

Steering Committee of State Authority of CAMPA, Mizoram State thurel bawhzui a, Finance Department leh Planning & Programme Implementation Department thuchhuak angin Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee chu Mizoram State CAMPA fund hman dan endik tura ruat a ni a. MSPMC chuan Mizoram State CAMPA fund atanga hnathawh kal mek leh sum hman dante (list of activities, utilisation of fund) te dilin a zirchiang a. Chumi hnuaia Field Inspection hmasa ber neihna atan Central Nursery, Sairang Dinthar chu a thlang ta a ni.

MSPMC Inpecting Team te hnathawh endik chu -

1.  Repair, Renovation & Improvement of Orchidarium, Sairang (Sairang-a nauban chinna hmun siamthat hna)

2.  Upgradation & Maintenance of Interpretation Centre (Thing leh hnim chi hrang hrang chungchang sawifiahna hmun tihchangtlun leh enkawl hna) te an ni.

MSPMC Inspecting Team-te hian sum hman dan leh hnathawhte a inphu em tih leh an hnathawh a tling tha em tih a hmunah uluk leh chik takin an endik a. An report hi Mizoram Sorkarah an la thehlut leh dawn a ni.

Vice Chairman, MSPMC hi MSPMC Members - Prof. Chawngsailova,  Pu P.C Malsawma, Pi Lalremsangi Fanai,  Pi Ngurmawii Sailo te bakah  Pu Vannunmawia, PS to Vice Chairman te’n an tawiawm a. Aizawl Forest Division atangin Pu Lalnunsanga Khawlhring, DFO;  Pu Andrew Lalthlamuana, ACF; Pu James Thanmawia, RO leh Pu Biakchhunga, RO, Sairang leh an thawhpuite’n an lo dawngsawng a ni.

Attachment

title: Khawzawl District Water & Sanitation Mission Review Meeting neih a ni
content:
4926/2025-2026Dated Khawzawl, 19th March, 2026 :Vawiin chhun dar 12:00 khan DC Conference Hall, Khawzawlah District Water & Sanitation Mission Review Meeting, Pu K. Vanlalthiana, Deputy Commissioner & Chairman DWSM hovin neih a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Member te hnenah lawmthu sawiin Meeting pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a, Er. Liantluanga Chohte, Sr. Executive Engineer, PHED & Member Secretary DWSM. Khawzawl District chuan Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada 2026 ( 8 – 23 March, 2026) activities hrang hrang neih tawh te chu Power Point presentation hmangin a entir a, hmalak leh zelna tur hmachhawpte sawiho nghal a ni.

Er. Freddy Vanlalmuanawma, SDO & Convener DTU, Khawzawl District chuan District Techinical Unit (DTU)-in DTU Assessment chungchanga hmalakna report pein, District chhunga khaw thlan bik siam a, Tui Meter vuah theihna turin Convergence plan siam chu DC Office-in hma la turin rawt a ni a. Khaw tina Field Testing Kit (FTK) an neih theih nan Convergence Plan siam tha an ti bawk a ni. District Water Source Sustainable Plan chu line Department-in an siam ang a, DWSM meeting leh hun remchangah pawm theih tura chhawpchhuah a ni ang.

Ni 23 March 2026 ah Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada kharna leh World Water Day chu ropui taka hman tum a ni a. Hemi hunah hian Jal Mahotsav Pakhwada chhunga khaw hrang hrang hmalaknate thlirho a ni ang.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Public Service Commission huaihawta Cooperative Audit Officer (CAO) under Cooperation Department Examination - neih tura hriattirna
content:
4925/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 19th March 2026:Mizoram Public Service Commission huaihawta Cooperative Audit Officer (CAO) under Cooperation Department Examination - neih turah Addl. Deputy Commissioner &  Co-ordinating Supervisor  Lawngtlai District chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian hriattirna a tichhuak.

PUBLIC NOTICE

Mizoram Public Service Commission huaihawtin  *Dt.23 to 25 March 2026 Chawhma dar 9:30 AM -12 :00 Noon leh Chawhma Dar 01:00 PM  - 03:30 PM* ah   *Cooperative Audit Officer (CAO) under Cooperation Department Examination* chu Govt. Lawngtlai College Lawngtlai ah neih tur a ni.

Candidate zawng zawng te Exam ni hian Zing Dar 08:30 AM ah Exam na hmun thlen theuh tawh tur a ni a, Admit Card ken theuh bawk tur a ni. Candidate zawng zawng te Frisking tih a ngaih avangin then hun tur dar bituk ah thlen kim vek tur a ni.

Candidate zawng zawngte thawmhnaw mumal tak inbel tura ni a, Kekawrbul, Slipper etc. in bel loh tur a ni. Tin Exam Centre ah ran hruai loh tur a ni.

Exam Hall-ah hian  *Electronic Gadget eng chi mah(Mobile Phone, digital watch, smart watch, lighter etc.) ken luh phal a ni lo.* Hei bakah hian thil bo hlauhthawnawm, leh kan mamawh loh thil ken loh hram nise. Keng lui kan awm a, a lo bo palh a nih chuan Exam Centre a officials leh duty ten mawh kan phur lovang.

Lirthei keng tur te tan Gate pawn ah Lirthei dah vek tur a ni ang.

Sd/-

DAVID LALRINAWMA

Addl. Deputy Commissioner

&

Co-ordinating Supervisor

Lawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

Attachment

title: COMMANDANT, 1ST IR BN, MUALVUM-IN POLICE PROMOTION HMU THAR TE RANK BADGE A BELTIR
content:
4924/2025-2026

Aizawl, 19th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu M.S Dawngkima, MPS, Commandant, 1st IR Bn., Mualvum chuan Mizoram Police hnuaia Havildar atanga Sub-Inspector (AB) a kaisan (promotion) hmu thar, 1st IR Bn. ami mi 10-te hnenah Rank Badge beltirna hun a hmang.

Tun hnaia Mizoram Police hnuaia Havildar atanga Sub-Inspector(AB) kaisan na tura intihsiakna, Departmental Promotion Examination neih zawh takah khan 1st IR Bn., Mualvum atang hian mi sawm (10) laiin hlawhtlinna changin promotion hi an hmu a. Heng hlawhtlinna changte zingah hian Mizoram pumah a titha ber dinhmun (1st Position) hauh tu an awm chu chhuanawm an tih thu tarlan a ni.

He hunah hian Commandant Pu M.S Dawngkima chuan kaisan tharte hnenah hian Sub-Inspector (AB) rank hi beltir nghalin, lawmpuina thuziak (citation) leh Cash Reward a hlan bawk a ni.

Kaisan tharte lawmpuina thu sawiin Commandant chuan, Mizoram huap inelna hmachhawn tur hian nikum lam atangin Battalion ang pawhin nasa takin an lo inbuatsaih tawh thu a sawi a. Rim taka an beihna avang leh Pathian malsawmna zarah a titha ber dinhmun hial 1st IR Bn., Mualvum-in an hauh thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, he hlawhtlinna hi 1st IR Bn., Mualvum tan chauh ni lo, Kolasib District tan pawha thil chhinchhiahtlak tak a nih thu a tarlang bawk.

Attachment

title: SIAHA-AH LIVESTOCK INSURANCE SCHEME KHUHHAWNNA NEIH A NI
content:
4923/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 19 March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00AM khan MADC Forest Hall, Council Vaih, Siahaah Livestock insurance khuhhawnna hun hman a ni a, Siaha district chhung khaw hrang hranga ran vulhtu mimal leh society hruaitu kal khawmte Livestock insurance chungchang hrilhhriatna neih nghal a ni.

Hun hman hi Dr. H. Lalzarliana, District AH & Vety. Officer, Siaha district-in a kaihruai a, Mizoramin bung thar a kaina tur hun pawimawh tak hmang tura kal khawmte chu lawmthu hrilhin, rante hi mi kut tawrh vangte, khuarel chhiatna leh hri avangin an thi fo a, chutianga chhiatna tawh palh hlauh anih pawha kut benga kan awm loh nan leh eng emaw zat zangnadawmna kan hmuh theih nan sawrkarin ruahmanna ṭha tak a siam chu ran vulhtu a tam thei ang berin chhawr se a duh thu sawiin, nikuma vawk hri (ASF) lêng vang khan Siaha district chhungah vawk nuai 800 man chuang thi leh suat anih thu Dr. H. Lalzarliana hian a sawi bawk.

Pu HZ Lalremtluanga, National Insurance Company Limited aiawh chuan Livestock Insurance inkaihhruaina leh kalpui dan tur a sawi zau a, Insurance kan tih reng rengin zaa za (100%) hmuh let theih a ni lo va, hri lenna hmuna sawrkarin a puan meka chengte tan insurance a tih theih loh bawk; chutih rualin Mizo mipuite hmakhua ngaia Mizoram sawrkar leh National Insurance Company Limited-in thawhhona thuthlung a ziak hi thil lawmawm tak a ni, a tam thei ang berin chhawr se a duh thu a sawi bawk.

Ran insurance inkaihhruaina tlangpui chu:-

I. INSURANCE ATANA DOCUMENT NGAITE:

a) Proposal Form

b) Vaccination Certificate

c) Geo Tagged photograph with date – 4 (Ear Tag No lang leh a ran chiang taka langin)

d) Soundness Certificate

e) Beneficiary Aadhaar Card/PAN Card/Voter ID

f) MNREGA Card / Ration Card

II. INSURANCE ATAN DOCUMENT THEHLUHNA TURTE:

A. Aizawl & Mamit District – Pi Lalhriatpuii (9147400133)

B. Kolasib District – Pi Lalrinmawii (9612626800)

C. Serchhip & Hnahthial District – Pi Lalmalsawmi (9147400511)

D. Saitual, Khawzawl leh Champhai District – Pi Angela Lalparmawii (8131959935)

E. Lawngtlai, Siaha leh Lunglei District – Pu Israel K Lalawmpuia (8794723988)

III. CLAIM CHUNGCHANG

i. INSURANCE CLAIM DAN:Natna avang emaw accident avanga ran a thi anih chuan darkar 24 chhungin emaw office kal ni (working day) hmasa berah Insurance Office hriattir tur a ni; document leh tul dang thehluh ngai te chu:

1. Claim Form

2. Death Certificate

3. Ear Tag (Ear Tag hi thehluh loh chuan claim a theihloh)

4. Post Mortem report

5. Vaccination certificate

6. Ran thlalak (A awm teh a, a len zawng lanna – Inches in leh EAR Tag chiang taka langin) - Geo Tagged thlalak pali tal date langin.

7. Bank Account Details (Passbook Front page copy emaw Cheque)

8. Insurance policy copy

ii. INSURANCE IN A HUAM CHIN:Natna avang emaw accident avanga ran thi (Death) tan zangnadawmna a hmuh theih ang.

iii. INSURANCE IN A HUAM LOHTE:

1. Claim atan document tarlante a kim lohin.

2. Raicheh a ran thi.

3. Ran bo.

4. Ran insualtir avanga thi.

5. Vaccination certificate hi ran thih laiin a nung (valid) ngei tur a ni.

6. Ran a thih aṭanga ni thum (3 working days) chhunga insurance office te hriattir a nih loh chuan insurance claim/ pek theih a ni lo ang.

7. Waiting period - Insurance a nun ni aṭangin ni 21 chhunga natna avanga ran thi chu a huam lo.

8. Transit coverage – Ran phurh kual laia a thihin a huam lo ang.

IV. RAN A THIH HUNA HRIATTIRNA TUR:

Ran a thi anih chuan heng a hnuai a number tarlanah hian hriattir nghal tur a ni.Aizawl, Mamit, Kolasib, Serchhip, Hnahthial, Saitual, Khawzawl leh Champhai District

1. Pi Lalhriatpuii: 9147400133

2. Pi Lalmalsawmi: 9147400511

Lunglei, Lawngtlai leh Siaha District tan

1. Pu Israel K Lalawmpuia: 8794723988

Insurance Company in ṭul a tih chuan claim endik turin Investigator a tir ṭhin ang.

V. ELIGIBILITY OF NLM SUBSIDY:

NLM Scheme hnuaia subsidy a chhungkaw khat (Household) tana ran insurance bithliah zat chu:

1. VAWK (PIG) – 50 nos

2. BAWNG/ SIAL (CATTLE/MITHUN) – 10 nos

3. BERAM/KEL (SHEEP/GOAT) – 100 nosChhungkua hi MNREGA Household anga lak tur a ni a, MNREGA ni lo tan chuan Ration Card hman a ni ang.

VI. SUM INSURED:

NLM Scheme a ran hlutna te chu hetiang hi a ni.

1. VAWK (PIG) – ₹30,000

2. BAWNG/ SIAL (CATTLE/MITHUN) – ₹60,000

3. BERAM/KEL (SHEEP/GOAT) – ₹7,000

VII. INSURANCE PREMIUM:

NLM Scheme hnuaia ran insurance man, kum khatah Ran pakhat tana pawisa sen ngai zat leh sawrkar tum zat:

1. Bawng/Sial: Total ₹3,894 (India sawrkar tum: ₹2,979, Mizoram Sawrkar tum: ₹331, Ran neitu pek tur zat: ₹584)

2. Vawk: Total ₹1,947 (India sawrkar tum: ₹1,490, Mizoram Sawrkar tum: ₹165, Ran neitu pek tur zat: ₹292)

3. Kel/Beram: Total ₹454 (India sawrkar tum: ₹348, Mizoram Sawrkar tum: ₹39, Ran neitu pek tur zat: ₹67)

(Bana kaih scheme beneficiary share chu Mizoram sawrkarin a chawi sak ang.)

VIII. INSURANCE CLAIM AṬANGA HMUHTHEIH ZAT:Ran vulh awm/dar (girt size) len zawng azirin pawisa hmuhlet theih hi a danglam.

Vawiin hun hmanah hian Mizoram sawrkar AH&Vety department, MADC-a Vety Department, MzSRLM aiawh bakah ran vulhtu leh ran vulh society hruaitute an tel a, zawhna leh chhanna bakah sawihona hun hman a ni. Dr. Benson Chhakchhuak, VO, District Vety Hospital, Siaha-in lawmthu sawina a nei a, hun hman tihtawp a ni. Hun hman zawh hian AH&Vety department Siaha district-a thawktute tan Livestock Insurance chungchang zirhona neih chhunzawm a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM STATE ELECTRICITY REGULATORY COMMISSION HNENA THURAWN PE TURA DIN ‘STATE ADVISORY COMMITTEE’ MEETING VAWI 28-NA NEIH A NI
content:
4922/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 19th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizoram Electricity Regulatory Commission (MZERC) huaihawtin Mizoram State Advisory Committee meeting vawi 28-na Aijal Club-ah neih a ni. MZERC Chairperson Er. Benjamin L. Tlumtea’n meeting hi kaihruaiin, Mizorama power supply tha zawk neih dan tur te, P&E department-in mipuite hnena eng tha tak a pek theih dan tur te, consumer-te hmakhaw ngai taka power supply chungchanga lungawi lohna rang zawka chin fel sak an nih theih dan tur te, AMC area leh AMC area pawn lama fel fai zawka Street light enkawl dan tur te, Smart Metering hna thawh mek chungchangte ngaihtuah a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian kum 2026 – 2027 atana P&E Department-in power supply enkawl nana sum a mamawhte, sawrkar subsidy leh eng chhit man (tariff) hmanga hmuh let leh dan turte sawi ho a ni bawk a. Naktuk March ni 20 hian P&E Department-in electricity tariff hman an dilna chungchang hi ngaihthlaknaPublic Hearingneih leh tur niin Commission-in mipui atanga rawtna leh sawiselna a dawnte leh P&E department chhannate ngaihthlak a ni ang.

MZERC hmasawnna tarlangin Chairman Er. Benjamin L. Tlumtea chuan Power Foundation of India-in nikum 2025-a States leh Union Territories-te chet that danPerformancerating a peknaah, point 87 hmuin Mizoram Electricity Regulatory Commission chuan India ram pumah 10-na a hauh phak thu a sawi a, Grade A hmu phak state tlemte (state 11) zinga Mizoram a tel ve thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

State Advisory Committee hi Section 87, Electricity Act, 2003-in a sawi anga, State Electricity Regulatory Commission thurawn petu tur atana din niin heng - Commerce, Industry, Transport, Agriculture, Labour, Consumers, non-governmental organizations leh Electric lam kaihhnawiha academic and research bodies hrang hrang atanga mi thiamte member atan ruat thin an ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER SPECIAL PACKAGE PHASE-II TANPUINA SUM HNAHTHIAL DISTRICT-AH PE CHHUAK
content:
4921/2025-2026Dated Hnahthial, The 19th March, 2026 :Chief Minister Special Package Phase-II hnuaia beneficiaries-te tanpuina sum pek chhuahna hun chu vawiin Chawhma dar 11:00 khan DC Meeting Hall No-I, ah neih niin Hnahthial Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan programme hi a kaihruai a. Progress Partner thlanchhuah tharte chu hmasawn tumna tak tak nei tur leh an tanpuina dawn te chu a hmanna tur diktak a hmang turin a chah.

Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte, Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Hnahthial-in District chhunga Bana Kaih Phase I hnuaia hmalak dan report pe in, Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare Department ah 1, Department of Animal Husbandry and Veterinary ah 7, Commerce and Industries ah 4 leh Department of Horticulture hnuaiah 5, an vaiin mi 17 hnenah loan hi Sanction an nih tawh thu a tarlang a. Loan te hi SBI, MRB leh MCAB atang te a Sanction an nih thu a tarlang bawk.

Pu George Lalnunluanga, District Fisheries Development Officer leh Dr. C. Sanghluna, District Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Officer te’n progress partner thlanchhuah te hnenah an trade a zira an hriattur tul te hrilhfiahna hun an nei a. Anmahni pui thei tur, Guide Pamphlet pawh an sem nghal bawk a ni.

Chief Minister Special Package Bana Kaih Phase-II hnuaia Progress Partner thlanchhuah te chu:

1. Thangtinhluna – Pangzawl – Fisheries (Sangha khawl leh a kaihhnawihte)

2. K. Lalchungnunga – Hnahthial Venglai – Poultry Farming (Broiler, Layer, Rainbow Rooster, Indigenous)

3. Zothansangi – Pangzawl Khawngbawk Veng – Poultry Farming (Broiler, Layer, Rainbow Rooster, Indigenous)

4. Lalnunpuii – Pangzawl Khawngbawk Veng – Poultry Farming (Broiler, Layer, Rainbow Rooster, Indigenous)

Progress Partner thlachhuah te hi an trade thlan theuhte hmanga an din chhuah theih nan Rs. 50,000/- theuh hlan an ni.

He programme-ah hian Bana Kaih Phase-I a ti tha te video tawi thlir ho na leh zawhna leh chhanna hun te neih a ni bawk.

Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte, Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Hnahthial chuan lawmthusawina neiin he programme hi a khar a ni.

title: SOCIAL WELFARE DEPARTMENT LEH SSM-TEN FATE ZINGA RILRU LEH PIANPHUNGA HARSATNA NEI  NU LEH PATE TANA INZIRTIRNA HUN BUATSAIH
content:
4919/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl: the 19 March 2026Vawiin khan Social Welfare Department leh Spastic Society of Mizoram (SSM) tangkawp chuan Dawrpui Multipurpose Centre ah, fate zinga rilru leh pianphunga harsatna nei nu leh pate tana inzirtirna hun ‘Sensitization Workshop for Parents of Children with Special Needs’ an buatsaih a. Pi Lalzarmawii, Commissioner & Secretary, Social Welfare Women & Child Development Department chuan he hun hi khuallian niin a hawng.

He hunah hian khuallian Pi lalzarmawii, Commissioner&Secretary, SW, W&CD Department chuan thusawiin, Sensitisation programme huaihawt chu pawimawh hle a a hriat thu a sawi a. Fate zinga rilru leh pianphunga harsatna nei nu leh pate dinhmun chu eng emaw chang chuan harsa tak a nih tur thu sawiin, beidawng mai lo leh kawng awm ang angte dap zel thei tura inhrilhhriatna neih chu tihmakmawh a nih thu a tar lang a. Nu leh pate chu an rawngbawlna an ko a tla hlen kawngah theihtawp chhuah zel tura fuihin, fanau ro chan malsawmna an dawnte chhiar thiam a, an fate enkawldan tur inzirtirna hun chu hlawkpui ngei tum tlat turin duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Vawiina Sensitization Workshop ah hian Mizorama Special School leh Centre hrang hrang atangin Rualbanlo fa nei nu leh pa kalkhawm ten nitin khawsak na kawnga buaina leh harsatna hrang hrang an hmachhawn thinte, an fate harsatna avanga zirna in leh khawtlang nun bakah, chhungkua leh kohhrana harsatna an tawh thinte sawi hovin, mithiamte nen hmalakho dan tur leh an fate enkawl zeldan tur zirhona hun an nei a ni.

Hawnna hun hi Pi Chhingpuii, Chairperson Spastic Society of Mizoram in kaihruai in, Pi Neihtluangi, Vice Chairperson Spastic Society Of Mizoram chuan Sensitization Workshop an buatsaih dan leh a pawimawhna te a sawizau a. Pi Zokhumi Vankung chuan lawmthu sawiin hawnna hun hi a titawp a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN THANGRAM CULTURAL MEET HMANPUI
content:
4918/2025-2026Ronpur, Assam, the 19th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Ronpur, Assam-ah Thangram Indigenous Peoples Movement (TPIM) leh MZP General Headquarters tangkawpin an buatsaih Thangram Cultural Meet 2026 chu neih a ni a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Kumin Thangram Cultural Meet hi a vawi hnihna a ni a, thupuiah, "Unau kan ni" tih chu hman a ni.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, history kan en chuan Cachar phaia khawsa hmasate chu Biate leh Hrangkhol te an ni a. Thangram pawh hi AD 1490 velah Ranglong, Sakechep, Hrangkhol, Molsom, Chorei leh Kaipeng hnamten an lo luah tawh a. British an lo lian a, an inkarah indonate a lo awm a. Vawiina Thangram kan han tih bik Langkaih phai leh Singla phai mel 180 biala zau hi kum 1867 khan ramri kham fel tak neiin British leh kan pipute khan inremna an siam ta a ni.

Ramriin min dai dan mah se hnam ri chu kham theih a ni lova, ram hranah te, state hranah te awm mahila, unau kan nihna te, hnam khat kan nihna te hi uar takin kan lantir zel dawn nia.

Inpumkhatna lama hmalakna kawngah Thangram mipuite in thawhhlawk hle a. In unau, tanpui ngaite tana vehbur in khawn dan te, Press Release siama in unaute thlavang in rawn hauh thin dan te pawh kan lo hre ve zel a. In chungah Mizoram mipuite pawh kan lawm a ni. Kan hnam huikhawmtu lian leh tangkai YMA te, MZP te leh kohhran te, kan tlawmngaipawl dangte kaltlangin nghet takin invuan tawn zel ang u.

Zofate huikhawm a, a tul anga tanpui zel hi kan sorkar duh dan leh kal dan a ni a. Khawvel huapa kan inhuikhawmna tur Mizo Diaspora Cell chu CM office-ah kan din tawh a. Hna pawh an thawk nasa a, mi tam tak an tanpui tawh a ni. Chutiang rilru putu sorkar chuan Thangrama kan unaute pawh hi a ngaihthah ngai lo vang che u. In tana dan hnuaia tih theih kan neih te chu kan ti zel dawn a. Fahrahin kan kalsan lo vang che u, a ti.

Tun hnaiah kan thenawma Zofate delh chin ramah harsatna a thleng hlawm a. Heng, kan chunga harsatna lo thleng te hi Pathian remruatna anga lo thleng, kan thatna tura a rawn tirh a ni lovang tih kan sawi thei lo. Engkim ti thei kan Pathianin hna a thawh chuan, theih loh reng reng hi a awm lo a ni. Chuvang chuan, a malsawmna kan dawn theih nan, “A ram leh a felna” zawng zel ang u.

Tin, Hriatna leh thiamna hi hmanraw hriam tak a ni a. Lo uar zel ang che u, tia chahin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Pu K. Vana Chorei, President, Thangram Indigenous Peoples Movement pawhin thusawiin, Mizoram Chief Minister meuhin kan ram a rawn tlawh hi a ropui a, hetiang taka ram hruaitu lianin min tlawh hi kan la hre ngai lo. Kan ram tana ni chhinchhiahtlak a tling. Tunah chuan kan chhehvela hnam dangte pawhin nu leh pa kan nei a ni tih min hmuhpui ta a ni, a ti a. Mizoram mipuite hian hetah in fate kan awm a ni tih hi min rawn hrereng rawh u, a ti.

Inkhawm hi Pu Sanghmingthanga, Vice President, MZP in a kaihruai a, Dr. C. Lalremruata, President, MZP leh Pu F. Lalnienga, Adviser, MZP ten thusawina hun an hmang a. Hnam lam leh zai chi hrang hrang entir a ni bawk.

Thangram tih hi Khawthlang ram (Thlang ram) tihna a ni a. Mizo thlang tla hmasate luah ram niin tunah hian khaw 24 vel leh mihring singthum vel an awm mek a. Heng rama cheng zo hnahthlak hnam parukte hian Thangram Indigenous Peoples Movement dinin kawng hrang hrangin hma an la mek a ni.

Attachment

title: EIRAWNGBAWLNA GAS, PETROL, DIESEL RENCHEM TUR LEH HARSATNA AWMLOH NANA MIPUITE HRIATTUR PAWIMAWH DCSO, KOLASIB THUCHHUAH
content:
4917/2025-2026

Kolasib, dated 19th March 2026 :District Civil Supplies Officer, Kolasib District chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian Eirawngbawlna Gas, Petrol, Diesel renchem tur leh harsatna awmloh nana District mipuite hriattur pawimawh hriattirna a chhuah.

No. I.21011/1/2020-DCSO(K)/: Tunlai khawvel Geo politics avangin mipuite eirawngbawlna Gas, Petrol leh Diesel a harsatna an tawh loh nan India Sawrkar chuan theihtawp in hma a la reng a, State Sawrkar pawhin mipuiten harsatna an tawh loh nan hma a la reng bawk a ni. Hetih rual hian a hnuaia point hrang hrang kan rawn tarlan te hi mipuiten zawm hram tum tur a ni.

1. Eirawngbawlna Gas a ren thei ang ber a hman tur a ni a. Kan mamawh aia tam lak khawl loh tur a ni. In lakkhawl ven nan sawrkar in hriattir na a siam angin Gas booking hi Gas kan lak ni atanga chhiar a ni 25 (sawmhnih panga) hnu ah chauh booking tih leh theih a ni.

2. Eirawngbawina Gas, Petrol leh Diesel zawrh chhawn/a black a zawrh leh chheprelh hi dan in a khap tlat a ni. Hetiang a inhnamhnawih kan hriat chuan thuneitute hnenah report thin tur a ni.

3. Tun dinhmun ah eirawngbawlna gas, diesel leh petrol ah harsatna emaw tlakchhamna a awm lova, mipuite phili buai lo tur leh thu belhchian dawl lo thehdarh lo turin kan in ngen a. Chutih rualin heng kan sawi tak-Gas, Petrol leh Diesel te hi renchem taka hmang theuh turin kan in ngen a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI SP HNEN ATANGA MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA
content:
4916/2025-2026Dated Lawngtlai, the 19thMarch, 2026 :Bailey bridge siamthat chungchangah a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai SP chuan hriattirna a tichhuak

HRIATTIRNA

Govt. of Mizoram Notification No. B.12021/10/2004- TRP, Dt 01.06.2020 leh The Motor Vehicles Act 1988(Act No.59 of 1988) Section 115 in thuneihna min pek angin, kei a hnuaia hming ziaktu hian he thupek hi ka chhuah e.

Bailey bridge (KM 38.763, KM 41.71, KM94.465, KM 98.900, KM 116.815, KM 122.80, KM 125.72, KM 126.278, KM 130.900, KM 140.875, KM 172.75 & KM 178. 875) LDP road a awm te chu a chhiat avangin leh siamthat hna thawh zawh anih hma chuan khualzin leh mipui vantlang him zawk nan motor lian (heavy loaded vehicle) tan zawh/ tlanphal ani lo.

He thupek zawm lo te chu Section 179, The Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 hmanga hrem an ni ang.He thupek hian chhiatrupna thil, kangmei leh medical emergency kaihhnawih a duty, dan leh thupek pawimawh bik a Police leh Magistrate duty-te chet velna a huamlo ang.

(PC LALCHUNGLURA) MPSSuperintendent of PoliceLawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

Attachment
